ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for international phone numbers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sales data was generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the sales */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the sales */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders in the sales record */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers in the sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers_segmented" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the customer is located */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the sales generated by the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segmented_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_country" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sales data was generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the sales */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the sales */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders in the sales record */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers in the sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_product" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the sales */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the sales */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders in the sales record */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers in the sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_customer" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the sales */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the sales */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders in the sales record */,
  "number_of_products" INTEGER /* Number of products purchased by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the customer is located */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_frequency" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of orders placed by the customer */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
